+---
+assignees: []
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: cc80
+project: pill-via-cm6
+title: 'Filter autocomplete: accepted tag lost when perspective is toggled before debounce fires'
+---
+## What
+
+**Bug repro**: In the perspective formula bar, type `#blo`, pause until the autocomplete dropdown shows `#BLOCKING`, press Enter to accept. The editor visually shows `#BLOCKING` (correct). Then toggle to another perspective and back â€” the saved filter is `#blo`, which matches nothing.
+
+**Root cause** â€” a race between the 300 ms debounced autosave and perspective remount:
+
+1. `FilterFormulaBar` is keyed by `activePerspective.id` (`kanban-app/ui/src/components/perspective-tab-bar.tsx` near line 219), so switching perspectives **unmounts** `FilterEditor`.
+2. `useFilterDispatch` in `kanban-app/ui/src/components/filter-editor.tsx` autosaves via `useDebouncedTimer` with a 300 ms delay (`AUTOSAVE_DELAY_MS`).
+3. `useDebouncedTimer` cleanup (`useEffect(() => cancel, [cancel])`) **cancels** any pending timer on unmount â€” it does not flush it.
+4. Timing that triggers the bug:
+   - `t=0â€¦300`: user types `#blo`. Each keystroke restarts the debounce.
+   - `t~600`: debounce fires with `#blo` â†’ `perspective.filter { filter: "#blo" }` is persisted while the user is still reading the dropdown.
+   - `t~700`: user presses Enter. Autocomplete's `apply: "#${slug}"` (`kanban-app/ui/src/lib/cm-mention-autocomplete.ts` line 61) replaces the doc text with `#BLOCKING`. `updateListener` fires â†’ `handleChange` â†’ debounce restarts, scheduled for `t~1000`.
+   - `t~800`: user toggles perspective. `FilterFormulaBar` remounts â†’ `useDebouncedTimer` cleanup cancels the `t~1000` save â†’ `#BLOCKING` is never persisted. The already-saved `#blo` stays.
+
+The visual correctness is real: `findMentionsInText` (`kanban-app/ui/src/lib/mention-finder.ts`) does exact slug matching, so the pill only renders when the doc text is exactly `#BLOCKING`. The editor state IS `#BLOCKING` post-acceptance â€” we just never save it.
+
+### Fix approach
+
+Change `useDebouncedTimer` so its unmount cleanup **flushes** the pending callback synchronously instead of dropping it. This preserves any in-flight autosave through remount races.
+
+- [ ] In `kanban-app/ui/src/components/filter-editor.tsx`, refactor `useDebouncedTimer`:
+  - Store the pending callback alongside the timer (new `pendingFnRef`).
+  - Add a `flush()` method: if a timer is pending, clear it and invoke the stored callback immediately.
+  - Change the unmount effect from `useEffect(() => cancel, [cancel])` to `useEffect(() => flush, [flush])`.
+  - Keep `cancel` available for the clear-button path (`handleClear` must still drop, not flush, because clear supersedes any pending save).
+  - Return `{ schedule, cancel, flush }` from the hook.
+- [ ] Verify `handleCommit` (Enter key) already dispatches immediately â€” it does, via `cancel()` + `apply(text)` â€” so no change needed there. Autocomplete acceptance already goes through `handleChange` â†’ debounce; flush-on-unmount covers it.
+- [ ] Do not change `handleBlur` behavior in `text-editor.tsx`. Blur within the same perspective keeps scheduling (no unmount, no race). This card is specifically the unmount race.
+
+### Out of scope
+
+- Reworking autocomplete acceptance to dispatch immediately (viable alternative, but more invasive â€” touches `cm-mention-autocomplete.ts` and the per-source `apply` composition).
+- Shortening `AUTOSAVE_DELAY_MS` (doesn't fix the race).
+- Flushing on blur (separate concern â€” user didn't report a blur-related loss).
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [ ] After typing `#blo`, accepting `#BLOCKING` from the autocomplete dropdown, and immediately switching perspectives, the saved filter on the originating perspective is `#BLOCKING` (not `#blo`).
+- [ ] The existing debounced-autosave behavior still works within a single perspective (no regressions in `filter-editor.test.tsx` autosave tests).
+- [ ] Clearing the filter via the Ă— button still cancels pending saves (does not flush stale `#blo` after a clear).
+- [ ] Enter-to-commit still dispatches immediately (no regression in the "Enter key dispatches perspective.filter immediately" test).
+
+## Tests
+
+- [ ] Add a test in `kanban-app/ui/src/components/filter-editor.test.tsx` (sibling to the existing `autosave` describe): "flushes pending autosave on unmount". Render `<FilterEditor filter="" perspectiveId="p1" />`, dispatch a doc change that inserts `#BLOCKING`, unmount the component **before** the 300 ms debounce elapses, and assert `mockInvoke` was called with `perspective.filter { filter: "#BLOCKING", perspective_id: "p1" }`.
+- [ ] Add a test: "does not flush after clear". Render with a filter, click the clear button (which calls `cancel()` + `dispatchClearFilter`), then unmount. Assert no extra `perspective.filter` dispatch fires on unmount (only the `perspective.clearFilter` from the button click).
+- [ ] Add a test simulating the autocomplete-then-remount race: dispatch a doc change to `#blo`, wait 400 ms (lets the `#blo` save fire), dispatch another doc change to `#BLOCKING`, then unmount within 100 ms (well under 300 ms). Assert the final `mockInvoke` call for `perspective.filter` was with `#BLOCKING`.
+- [ ] Run: `cd kanban-app/ui && npm test -- filter-editor` â€” all tests pass.
+- [ ] Run the full UI suite: `cd kanban-app/ui && npm test` â€” no regressions.
+
+## Workflow
+
+- Use `/tdd` â€” write the three new tests first (they should fail against the current `cancel`-on-unmount behavior), then change `useDebouncedTimer` to flush on unmount so they pass.

changes.value: Filter autocomplete: accepted tag lost when perspective is toggled before debounce fires

## What

**Bug repro**: In the perspective formula bar, type `#blo`, pause until the autocomplete dropdown shows `#BLOCKING`, press Enter to accept. The editor visually shows `#BLOCKING` (correct). Then toggle to another perspective and back â€” the saved filter is `#blo`, which matches nothing.

**Root cause** â€” a race between the 300 ms debounced autosave and perspective remount:

1. `FilterFormulaBar` is keyed by `activePerspective.id` (`kanban-app/ui/src/components/perspective-tab-bar.tsx` near line 219), so switching perspectives **unmounts** `FilterEditor`.
2. `useFilterDispatch` in `kanban-app/ui/src/components/filter-editor.tsx` autosaves via `useDebouncedTimer` with a 300 ms delay (`AUTOSAVE_DELAY_MS`).
3. `useDebouncedTimer` cleanup (`useEffect(() => cancel, [cancel])`) **cancels** any pending timer on unmount â€” it does not flush it.
4. Timing that triggers the bug:
   - `t=0â€¦300`: user types `#blo`. Each keystroke restarts the debounce.
   - `t~600`: debounce fires with `#blo` â†’ `perspective.filter { filter: "#blo" }` is persisted while the user is still reading the dropdown.
   - `t~700`: user presses Enter. Autocomplete's `apply: "#${slug}"` (`kanban-app/ui/src/lib/cm-mention-autocomplete.ts` line 61) replaces the doc text with `#BLOCKING`. `updateListener` fires â†’ `handleChange` â†’ debounce restarts, scheduled for `t~1000`.
   - `t~800`: user toggles perspective. `FilterFormulaBar` remounts â†’ `useDebouncedTimer` cleanup cancels the `t~1000` save â†’ `#BLOCKING` is never persisted. The already-saved `#blo` stays.

The visual correctness is real: `findMentionsInText` (`kanban-app/ui/src/lib/mention-finder.ts`) does exact slug matching, so the pill only renders when the doc text is exactly `#BLOCKING`. The editor state IS `#BLOCKING` post-acceptance â€” we just never save it.

### Fix approach

Change `useDebouncedTimer` so its unmount cleanup **flushes** the pending callback synchronously instead of dropping it. This preserves any in-flight autosave through remount races.

- [ ] In `kanban-app/ui/src/components/filter-editor.tsx`, refactor `useDebouncedTimer`:
  - Store the pending callback alongside the timer (new `pendingFnRef`).
  - Add a `flush()` method: if a timer is pending, clear it and invoke the stored callback immediately.
  - Change the unmount effect from `useEffect(() => cancel, [cancel])` to `useEffect(() => flush, [flush])`.
  - Keep `cancel` available for the clear-button path (`handleClear` must still drop, not flush, because clear supersedes any pending save).
  - Return `{ schedule, cancel, flush }` from the hook.
- [ ] Verify `handleCommit` (Enter key) already dispatches immediately â€” it does, via `cancel()` + `apply(text)` â€” so no change needed there. Autocomplete acceptance already goes through `handleChange` â†’ debounce; flush-on-unmount covers it.
- [ ] Do not change `handleBlur` behavior in `text-editor.tsx`. Blur within the same perspective keeps scheduling (no unmount, no race). This card is specifically the unmount race.

### Out of scope

- Reworking autocomplete acceptance to dispatch immediately (viable alternative, but more invasive â€” touches `cm-mention-autocomplete.ts` and the per-source `apply` composition).
- Shortening `AUTOSAVE_DELAY_MS` (doesn't fix the race).
- Flushing on blur (separate concern â€” user didn't report a blur-related loss).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] After typing `#blo`, accepting `#BLOCKING` from the autocomplete dropdown, and immediately switching perspectives, the saved filter on the originating perspective is `#BLOCKING` (not `#blo`).
- [ ] The existing debounced-autosave behavior still works within a single perspective (no regressions in `filter-editor.test.tsx` autosave tests).
- [ ] Clearing the filter via the Ă— button still cancels pending saves (does not flush stale `#blo` after a clear).
- [ ] Enter-to-commit still dispatches immediately (no regression in the "Enter key dispatches perspective.filter immediately" test).

## Tests

- [ ] Add a test in `kanban-app/ui/src/components/filter-editor.test.tsx` (sibling to the existing `autosave` describe): "flushes pending autosave on unmount". Render `<FilterEditor filter="" perspectiveId="p1" />`, dispatch a doc change that inserts `#BLOCKING`, unmount the component **before** the 300 ms debounce elapses, and assert `mockInvoke` was called with `perspective.filter { filter: "#BLOCKING", perspective_id: "p1" }`.
- [ ] Add a test: "does not flush after clear". Render with a filter, click the clear button (which calls `cancel()` + `dispatchClearFilter`), then unmount. Assert no extra `perspective.filter` dispatch fires on unmount (only the `perspective.clearFilter` from the button click).
- [ ] Add a test simulating the autocomplete-then-remount race: dispatch a doc change to `#blo`, wait 400 ms (lets the `#blo` save fire), dispatch another doc change to `#BLOCKING`, then unmount within 100 ms (well under 300 ms). Assert the final `mockInvoke` call for `perspective.filter` was with `#BLOCKING`.
- [ ] Run: `cd kanban-app/ui && npm test -- filter-editor` â€” all tests pass.
- [ ] Run the full UI suite: `cd kanban-app/ui && npm test` â€” no regressions.

## Workflow

- Use `/tdd` â€” write the three new tests first (they should fail against the current `cancel`-on-unmount behavior), then change `useDebouncedTimer` to flush on unmount so they pass.
